---
title: "AI-Enhanced U.S. County Migration Dashboard"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
library(viridis)
library(sf)
library(tigris)
library(geojsonsf)
library(jsonlite)
library(scales)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(httr)
```

```{r}
# Import preprocessed data.
analysis_df = readRDS("dashboard_data/analysis_df.rds")
top_pairs_named = read_csv("dashboard_data/top_pairs_named.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
words_df = read_csv("dashboard_data/words_df.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Split any 5-digit FIPS column into 2-digit state + 3-digit county.
split_fips_cols = function(df, fips_cols) {
  df |>
    mutate(
      across(
        any_of(fips_cols),
        ~ stringr::str_pad(as.character(.x), width = 5, pad = "0")
      )
    ) |>
    mutate(
      across(
        any_of(fips_cols),
        ~ stringr::str_sub(.x, 1, 2),
        .names = "{.col}_state"
      ),
      across(
        any_of(fips_cols),
        ~ stringr::str_sub(.x, 3, 5),
        .names = "{.col}_county"
      )
    )
}

analysis_df = analysis_df |>
  split_fips_cols(c("dest_fips", "orig_fips", "county_fips", "pair_1_fips", "pair_2_fips")) |>
  separate(
    county_state,
    into = c("county", "state"),
    sep = ",\\s*",
    remove = FALSE,
    fill = "right"
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    net_out_flow = total_out_exemptions - total_in_exemptions
  )

top_pairs_named = top_pairs_named |>
  split_fips_cols(c("pair_1_fips", "pair_2_fips")) |>
  separate(
    pair_1_county,
    into = c("pair_1_county_name", "pair_1_state"),
    sep = ",\\s*",
    remove = FALSE
  ) |>
  separate(
    pair_2_county,
    into = c("pair_2_county_name", "pair_2_state"),
    sep = ",\\s*",
    remove = FALSE
  )

analysis_df = analysis_df |>
  mutate(
    county_fips = stringr::str_pad(as.character(county_fips), 5, pad = "0")
  ) 

top_pairs_named = top_pairs_named |>
  mutate(
    pair_1_fips = stringr::str_pad(as.character(pair_1_fips), 5, pad = "0"),
    pair_2_fips = stringr::str_pad(as.character(pair_2_fips), 5, pad = "0")
  )

# One row per county for map / lookup / comparison.
county_df = analysis_df |>
  mutate(
    county_fips = stringr::str_pad(as.character(county_fips), 5, pad = "0"),
    net_out_flow = total_out_exemptions - total_in_exemptions
  ) |>
  distinct(county_fips, .keep_all = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# ---------- Helper functions ----------

`%||%` = function(x, y) {
  if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0) y else x
}

safe_first = function(x, default = NA) {
  if (length(x) == 0 || all(is.na(x))) default else x[[1]]
}

dataframe_to_records = function(df) {
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(list())
  jsonlite::fromJSON(
    jsonlite::toJSON(df, dataframe = "rows", auto_unbox = TRUE, na = "null"),
    simplifyVector = FALSE
  )
}

clean_feature_name = function(x) {
  stringr::str_replace_all(x, "<br>", " ")
}

format_feature_raw = function(feature, value) {
  case_when(
    feature == "Median<br>income" ~ paste0("$", scales::comma(round(value, 0))),
    feature == "Unemployment<br>rate" ~ paste0(round(value, 1), "%"),
    feature == "Population" ~ scales::comma(round(value, 0)),
    feature == "Median<br>rent" ~ paste0("$", scales::comma(round(value, 0))),
    feature == "Young<br>share" ~ paste0(round(value * 100, 1), "%"),
    TRUE ~ as.character(round(value, 2))
  )
}

get_map_value_df = function(df, map_type) {
  df |>
    mutate(
      map_value = dplyr::case_when(
        map_type == "in" ~ total_in_exemptions,
        map_type == "out" ~ total_out_exemptions,
        map_type == "net" ~ net_out_flow,
        map_type == "gross" ~ gross_flow,
        map_type == "population" ~ population
      ),
      map_label = dplyr::case_when(
        map_type == "in" ~ "In migration",
        map_type == "out" ~ "Out migration",
        map_type == "net" ~ "Net out migration",
        map_type == "gross" ~ "Gross migration",
        map_type == "population" ~ "Population"
      )
    )
}

get_clicked_id = function(click_data) {
  if (is.null(click_data)) return(NULL)
  
  if (!is.null(click_data$key) && length(click_data$key) > 0) {
    return(stringr::str_pad(as.character(click_data$key[[1]]), 5, pad = "0"))
  }
  
  if (!is.null(click_data$location) && length(click_data$location) > 0) {
    return(stringr::str_pad(as.character(click_data$location[[1]]), 5, pad = "0"))
  }
  
  if (!is.null(click_data$customdata)) {
    cd = click_data$customdata
    
    if (is.list(cd)) {
      cd = unlist(cd, recursive = TRUE, use.names = FALSE)
    }
    
    if (length(cd) > 0) {
      return(stringr::str_pad(as.character(cd[[1]]), 5, pad = "0"))
    }
  }
  
  return(NULL)
}

make_empty_plot = function(message, title = NULL, source = NULL) {
  p = plot_ly(
    x = numeric(0),
    y = numeric(0),
    type = "scatter",
    mode = "markers",
    source = source
  ) |>
    layout(
      title = title,
      annotations = list(
        list(
          text = message,
          x = 0.5,
          y = 0.5,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          font = list(size = 14)
        )
      ),
      xaxis = list(visible = FALSE),
      yaxis = list(visible = FALSE),
      margin = list(l = 40, r = 20, t = 40, b = 40)
    )
  
  if (!is.null(source)) {
    p = p |> event_register("plotly_click")
  }
  
  p
}

extract_response_text = function(resp_json) {
  if (!is.null(resp_json$output_text) &&
      length(resp_json$output_text) > 0 &&
      nzchar(resp_json$output_text)) {
    return(resp_json$output_text)
  }
  
  pieces = c()
  
  for (item in resp_json$output %||% list()) {
    if (!is.null(item$content) && is.list(item$content)) {
      for (part in item$content) {
        if (!is.null(part$type) &&
            identical(part$type, "output_text") &&
            !is.null(part$text)) {
          pieces = c(pieces, part$text)
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  paste(pieces, collapse = "\n")
}

call_openai_summary = function(prompt_text) {
  api_key = Sys.getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY")
  model_name = Sys.getenv("OPENAI_MODEL", unset = "gpt-5.4-mini")
  
  if (api_key == "") {
    stop("Missing OPENAI_API_KEY. Add it to your .Renviron and restart R.")
  }
  
  developer_prompt = paste(
    "You are a migration dashboard analyst.",
    "Use only the structured dashboard data provided.",
    "Do not invent any facts or causes not supported by the data.",
    "If a section is missing, skip it rather than guessing.",
    "Return exactly 4 short bullets in plain text:",
    "1) Map pattern",
    "2) Interaction pattern",
    "3) Feature comparison or plausible interpretation",
    "4) Caution or limitation",
    sep = " "
  )
  
  body_list = list(
    model = model_name,
    input = list(
      list(
        role = "developer",
        content = developer_prompt
      ),
      list(
        role = "user",
        content = prompt_text
      )
    ),
    text = list(
      format = list(type = "text")
    ),
    max_output_tokens = 350,
    store = FALSE
  )
  
  res = httr::POST(
    url = "https://api.openai.com/v1/responses",
    httr::add_headers(
      Authorization = paste("Bearer", api_key),
      `Content-Type` = "application/json"
    ),
    body = jsonlite::toJSON(body_list, auto_unbox = TRUE, null = "null"),
    encode = "raw",
    httr::timeout(45)
  )
  
  if (httr::http_error(res)) {
    err_text = httr::content(res, as = "text", encoding = "UTF-8")
    stop(paste("OpenAI API request failed:", err_text))
  }
  
  parsed = jsonlite::fromJSON(
    httr::content(res, as = "text", encoding = "UTF-8"),
    simplifyVector = FALSE
  )
  
  txt = extract_response_text(parsed)
  
  if (is.null(txt) || !nzchar(txt)) {
    stop("The model response was empty.")
  }
  
  txt
}
```

## Column {.sidebar data-width=350}

```{r}
states = analysis_df |> distinct(state) |> pull()

selectInput(
  "state_choice", 
  label = h4("Select state"),
  choices = c("All States" = "all", stats::setNames(states, states)),
  selected = "All States"
)
```

```{r}
selectInput(
  "map_type",
  label = h4("Select migration measure"),
  choices = c(
    "Population" = "population",
    "In migration" = "in",
    "Out migration" = "out",
    "Net out migration" = "net",
    "Gross migration" = "gross"
  ),
  selected = "net"
)
```

```{r}
actionButton(
  "generate_ai_summary",
  "Generate AI Summary"
)

tags$hr()

h4("AI Summary")

uiOutput("ai_summary_box")
```

## Column {data-width="520"}

### Migration Overview Map

```{r}
selected_county_fips = reactiveVal(NULL)
selected_county_name = reactiveVal(NULL)
selected_partner_fips = reactiveVal(NULL)
selected_partner_name = reactiveVal(NULL)
ai_summary_text = reactiveVal("Click the button to generate AI insights from the current dashboard state.")

observeEvent(selected_county_fips(), {
  selected_partner_fips(NULL)
  selected_partner_name(NULL)
})

observeEvent(
  event_data("plotly_click", source = "map_click", priority = "event"),
  ignoreInit = TRUE,
  {
    click_data = event_data("plotly_click", source = "map_click", priority = "event")
    clicked_fips = get_clicked_id(click_data)
    
    req(clicked_fips)
    
    selected_county_fips(clicked_fips)
    
    county_label = county_df |>
      filter(county_fips == clicked_fips) |>
      pull(county_state)
    
    selected_county_name(county_label[1])
  }
)

output$measure_range_ui = renderUI({
  df_range = get_map_value_df(county_df, input$map_type)
  
  if (input$state_choice != "all") {
    df_range = df_range |> filter(state == input$state_choice)
  }
  
  req(nrow(df_range) > 0)
  
  range_min = floor(min(df_range$map_value, na.rm = TRUE))
  range_max = ceiling(max(df_range$map_value, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  sliderInput(
    "measure_range",
    label = "Select measure range",
    min = range_min,
    max = range_max,
    value = c(range_min, range_max),
    sep = ","
  )
})

filtered_map_df = reactive({
  req(input$measure_range)
  
  df = get_map_value_df(county_df, input$map_type)
  
  if (input$state_choice != "all") {
    df = df |> filter(state == input$state_choice)
  }
  
  df |>
    filter(
      map_value >= input$measure_range[1],
      map_value <= input$measure_range[2]
    ) |>
    distinct(county_fips, .keep_all = TRUE)
})

output$map = renderPlotly({
  df = filtered_map_df()
  req(nrow(df) > 0)
  
  counties_geojson = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/plotly/datasets/master/geojson-counties-fips.json"
  
  plot_title = if (input$state_choice == "all") {
    paste0(unique(df$map_label), " by County (United States)")
  } else {
    paste0(unique(df$map_label), " by County (", input$state_choice, ")")
  }
  
  line_width = if (input$state_choice == "all") 0.1 else 0.5
  
  if (input$map_type == "net") {
    max_abs = max(abs(df$map_value), na.rm = TRUE)
    
    p = plot_ly(
      data = df,
      source = "map_click",
      geojson = counties_geojson,
      featureidkey = "id",
      locations = ~county_fips,
      z = ~map_value,
      type = "choropleth",
      colorscale = "RdBu",
      zmin = -max_abs,
      zmax = max_abs,
      customdata = ~county_fips,
      key = ~county_fips,
      marker = list(line = list(color = "white", width = line_width)),
      text = ~paste0(
        "State: ", state,
        "<br>County: ", county,
        "<br>", map_label, ": ", scales::comma(map_value)
      ),
      hovertemplate = "%{text}<extra></extra>",
      colorbar = list(title = "Net out migration")
    )
    
  } else {
    
    p = plot_ly(
      data = df,
      source = "map_click",
      geojson = counties_geojson,
      featureidkey = "id",
      locations = ~county_fips,
      z = ~map_value,
      type = "choropleth",
      colorscale = "Blues",
      reversescale = TRUE,
      customdata = ~county_fips,
      key = ~county_fips,
      marker = list(line = list(color = "white", width = line_width)),
      text = ~paste0(
        "State: ", state,
        "<br>County: ", county,
        "<br>", map_label, ": ", scales::comma(map_value)
      ),
      hovertemplate = "%{text}<extra></extra>",
      colorbar = list(title = unique(df$map_label))
    )
  }
  
  if (input$state_choice == "all") {
    p = p |>
      layout(
        title = plot_title,
        clickmode = "event+select",
        margin = list(l = 0, r = 0, t = 45, b = 0),
        paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
        plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
        geo = list(
          scope = "usa",
          showland = FALSE,
          showlakes = FALSE,
          showcountries = FALSE,
          showcoastlines = FALSE,
          showsubunits = FALSE,
          bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)"
        )
      )
  } else {
    p = p |>
      layout(
        title = plot_title,
        clickmode = "event+select",
        margin = list(l = 0, r = 0, t = 45, b = 0),
        paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
        plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
        geo = list(
          scope = "usa",
          fitbounds = "locations",
          showland = FALSE,
          showlakes = FALSE,
          showcountries = FALSE,
          showcoastlines = FALSE,
          showsubunits = FALSE,
          bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)"
        )
      )
  }
  
  p |> event_register("plotly_click")
})

htmltools::div(
  style = "display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%;",
  
  htmltools::div(
    style = "flex: 1 1 auto; min-height: 0;",
    plotlyOutput("map", height = "100%")
  ),
  
  htmltools::div(
    style = "flex: 0 0 auto; display: flex; justify-content: center; padding-top: 12px;",
    htmltools::div(
      style = "width: 420px;",
      uiOutput("measure_range_ui")
    )
  )
)
```

## Column {data-width="380"}

### Top Interaction Counties

```{r}
observeEvent(
  event_data("plotly_click", source = "bar_click", priority = "event"),
  ignoreInit = TRUE,
  {
    click_data = event_data("plotly_click", source = "bar_click", priority = "event")
    clicked_partner_fips = get_clicked_id(click_data)
    
    req(clicked_partner_fips)
    
    selected_partner_fips(clicked_partner_fips)
    
    partner_label = county_df |>
      filter(county_fips == clicked_partner_fips) |>
      pull(county_state)
    
    selected_partner_name(partner_label[1])
  }
)

top_interaction_df = reactive({
  clicked_fips = selected_county_fips()
  
  if (is.null(clicked_fips)) return(NULL)
  
  top_pairs_named |>
    filter(pair_1_fips == clicked_fips | pair_2_fips == clicked_fips) |>
    mutate(
      partner_fips = if_else(pair_1_fips == clicked_fips, pair_2_fips, pair_1_fips),
      partner_county = if_else(pair_1_fips == clicked_fips, pair_2_county_name, pair_1_county_name),
      partner_state = if_else(pair_1_fips == clicked_fips, pair_2_state, pair_1_state),
      partner_label = paste0(partner_county, ", ", partner_state)
    ) |>
    group_by(partner_fips, partner_county, partner_state, partner_label) |>
    summarise(
      total_exemptions = sum(total_exemptions, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    arrange(desc(total_exemptions)) |>
    slice_head(n = 10) |>
    arrange(total_exemptions) |>
    mutate(
      partner_label = factor(partner_label, levels = unique(partner_label)),
      hover_text = paste0(
        "State: ", partner_state,
        "<br>County: ", partner_county
      )
    )
})

output$bar_chart = renderPlotly({
  clicked_fips = selected_county_fips()
  
  if (is.null(clicked_fips)) {
    return(
      make_empty_plot(
        message = "Click a county in Chart A first",
        title = "Top Interaction Counties",
        source = "bar_click"
      )
    )
  }
  
  clicked_county_name = county_df |>
    filter(county_fips == clicked_fips) |>
    pull(county)
  
  clicked_county_name = clicked_county_name[1]
  
  df_bar = top_interaction_df()
  req(!is.null(df_bar), nrow(df_bar) > 0)
  
  plot_ly(
    data = df_bar,
    source = "bar_click",
    x = ~total_exemptions,
    y = ~partner_label,
    type = "bar",
    orientation = "h",
    customdata = ~partner_fips,
    key = ~partner_fips,
    hovertext = ~hover_text,
    hovertemplate = paste0(
      "%{hovertext}<br>",
      "Total interaction: %{x:,}<extra></extra>"
    )
  ) |>
    layout(
      title = paste0("Top 10 Interaction Counties for ", clicked_county_name),
      clickmode = "event+select",
      xaxis = list(title = "Total interaction (exemptions)"),
      yaxis = list(title = ""),
      margin = list(l = 20, r = 20, t = 45, b = 40),
      hoverlabel = list(align = "left")
    ) |>
    event_register("plotly_click")
})

plotlyOutput("bar_chart", height = "500px")
```

### County Feature Comparison

```{r}
feature_compare_data = reactive({
  a_fips = selected_county_fips()
  b_fips = selected_partner_fips()
  
  if (is.null(a_fips) || is.null(b_fips)) return(NULL)
  
  feature_base = county_df |>
    mutate(
      income_pctile = dplyr::percent_rank(median_household_income) * 100,
      unemp_pctile = dplyr::percent_rank(unemp_percent) * 100,
      pop_pctile = dplyr::percent_rank(population) * 100,
      rent_pctile = dplyr::percent_rank(rent50_2) * 100,
      young_pctile = dplyr::percent_rank(young_share) * 100
    ) |>
    filter(county_fips %in% c(a_fips, b_fips)) |>
    distinct(county_fips, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
    mutate(
      full_label = county_state,
      short_label = dplyr::case_when(
        county == "District of Columbia" ~ "DC",
        TRUE ~ county |>
          stringr::str_remove(" County$") |>
          stringr::str_remove(" Parish$") |>
          stringr::str_remove(" Borough$") |>
          stringr::str_remove(" Census Area$") |>
          stringr::str_remove(" Municipality$")
      )
    )
  
  if (length(unique(feature_base$county_fips)) != 2) return(NULL)
  if (!all(c(a_fips, b_fips) %in% feature_base$county_fips)) return(NULL)
  
  county_full_a = feature_base |> filter(county_fips == a_fips) |> pull(full_label)
  county_full_b = feature_base |> filter(county_fips == b_fips) |> pull(full_label)
  
  scaled_long = feature_base |>
    transmute(
      county_short = short_label,
      county_full = full_label,
      county_name = county,
      state_name = state,
      `Median<br>income` = income_pctile,
      `Unemployment<br>rate` = unemp_pctile,
      `Population` = pop_pctile,
      `Median<br>rent` = rent_pctile,
      `Young<br>share` = young_pctile
    ) |>
    tidyr::pivot_longer(
      cols = c(
        `Median<br>income`,
        `Unemployment<br>rate`,
        `Population`,
        `Median<br>rent`,
        `Young<br>share`
      ),
      names_to = "feature",
      values_to = "scaled_value"
    )
  
  raw_long = feature_base |>
    transmute(
      county_short = short_label,
      county_full = full_label,
      county_name = county,
      state_name = state,
      `Median<br>income` = median_household_income,
      `Unemployment<br>rate` = unemp_percent,
      `Population` = population,
      `Median<br>rent` = rent50_2,
      `Young<br>share` = young_share
    ) |>
    tidyr::pivot_longer(
      cols = c(
        `Median<br>income`,
        `Unemployment<br>rate`,
        `Population`,
        `Median<br>rent`,
        `Young<br>share`
      ),
      names_to = "feature",
      values_to = "raw_value"
    )
  
  plot_df = scaled_long |>
    dplyr::left_join(
      raw_long,
      by = c("county_short", "county_full", "county_name", "state_name", "feature")
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      feature = factor(
        feature,
        levels = c(
          "Median<br>income",
          "Unemployment<br>rate",
          "Population",
          "Median<br>rent",
          "Young<br>share"
        )
      ),
      raw_label = purrr::map2_chr(feature, raw_value, format_feature_raw),
      hover_text = paste0(
        "State: ", state_name,
        "<br>County: ", county_name,
        "<br>Feature: ", clean_feature_name(feature),
        "<br>Percentile among U.S. counties: ", round(scaled_value, 1),
        "<br>Raw value: ", raw_label
      )
    )
  
  list(
    base = feature_base,
    plot = plot_df,
    county_full_a = county_full_a[1],
    county_full_b = county_full_b[1]
  )
})

output$feature_compare = renderPlotly({
  compare_obj = feature_compare_data()
  
  if (is.null(selected_county_fips())) {
    return(make_empty_plot("Click a county in Chart A to start"))
  }
  
  if (is.null(selected_partner_fips())) {
    return(make_empty_plot("Now click a county in Chart B to compare features"))
  }
  
  req(!is.null(compare_obj))
  
  plot_df = compare_obj$plot
  county_full_a = compare_obj$county_full_a
  county_full_b = compare_obj$county_full_b
  
  plot_ly(
    data = plot_df,
    x = ~feature,
    y = ~scaled_value,
    color = ~county_short,
    type = "bar",
    text = ~raw_label,
    hovertext = ~hover_text,
    hovertemplate = "%{hovertext}<extra></extra>"
  ) |>
    layout(
      annotations = list(
        list(
          text = paste0(
            "<b>", county_full_a, "</b>",
            " vs ",
            "<b>", county_full_b, "</b>"
          ),
          x = 0.02,
          y = 1.06,
          xref = "paper",
          yref = "paper",
          xanchor = "left",
          yanchor = "bottom",
          showarrow = FALSE,
          align = "left",
          font = list(size = 12, color = "#555555")
        )
      ),
      barmode = "group",
      xaxis = list(
        title = "",
        tickangle = 0,
        automargin = TRUE,
        tickfont = list(size = 12)
      ),
      yaxis = list(
        title = "Percentile",
        range = c(0, 100),
        automargin = TRUE,
        titlefont = list(size = 14),
        tickfont = list(size = 11)
      ),
      legend = list(
        orientation = "h",
        x = 0.02,
        y = -0.2,
        xanchor = "left",
        font = list(size = 12)
      ),
      margin = list(
        l = 60,
        r = 20,
        t = 30,
        b = 0
      ),
      hoverlabel = list(align = "left")
    )
})

plotlyOutput("feature_compare", height = "560px")
```

```{r}
# ---------- AI summary ----------

build_ai_prompt = function(map_df, bar_df = NULL, compare_obj = NULL) {
  selected_fips = selected_county_fips()
  selected_partner = selected_partner_fips()
  
  map_rank_df = if (input$map_type == "net") {
    map_df |> arrange(desc(abs(map_value)))
  } else {
    map_df |> arrange(desc(map_value))
  }
  
  selected_row = tibble()
  selected_rank = NA_integer_
  
  if (!is.null(selected_fips)) {
    selected_row = map_df |>
      filter(county_fips == selected_fips) |>
      slice(1)
    
    if (nrow(selected_row) == 1) {
      selected_rank = match(selected_fips, map_rank_df$county_fips)
    }
  }
  
  top_visible_df = map_rank_df |>
    transmute(
      county = county_state,
      value = round(map_value, 2)
    ) |>
    slice_head(n = 5)
  
  selected_state = if (!is.null(selected_fips) && length(selected_fips) == 1) {
  county_df |>
    filter(county_fips == selected_fips) |>
    pull(state) |>
    safe_first(default = NA_character_)
} else {
  NA_character_
}
  
  interaction_context = NULL
  
  if (!is.null(bar_df) && nrow(bar_df) > 0) {
    bar_desc = bar_df |>
      arrange(desc(total_exemptions))
    
    interaction_context = list(
      selected_origin_county = selected_county_name(),
      strongest_partner = safe_first(bar_desc$partner_label, NA_character_),
      strongest_partner_value = safe_first(bar_desc$total_exemptions, NA_real_),
      top1_share_of_top10 = round(100 * max(bar_desc$total_exemptions) / sum(bar_desc$total_exemptions), 1),
      same_state_count_in_top10 = sum(bar_desc$partner_state == selected_state, na.rm = TRUE),
      top_partners = dataframe_to_records(
        bar_desc |>
          transmute(
            county = partner_label,
            total_interaction = round(total_exemptions, 0)
          )
      )
    )
  }
  
  comparison_context = NULL
  
  if (!is.null(compare_obj)) {
    gap_df = compare_obj$plot |>
      mutate(feature_clean = clean_feature_name(as.character(feature))) |>
      group_by(feature_clean) |>
      summarise(
        higher_county = county_full[which.max(scaled_value)],
        lower_county = county_full[which.min(scaled_value)],
        percentile_gap = round(diff(range(scaled_value)), 1),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) |>
      arrange(desc(percentile_gap))
    
    comparison_context = list(
      county_a = compare_obj$county_full_a,
      county_b = compare_obj$county_full_b,
      largest_gaps = dataframe_to_records(gap_df |> slice_head(n = 3)),
      feature_values = dataframe_to_records(
        compare_obj$plot |>
          transmute(
            county = county_full,
            feature = clean_feature_name(as.character(feature)),
            percentile = round(scaled_value, 1),
            raw_value = raw_label
          )
      )
    )
  }
  
  context_list = list(
    dashboard_state = list(
      geography = if (input$state_choice == "all") "United States" else input$state_choice,
      measure = safe_first(map_df$map_label, NA_character_),
      range_min = input$measure_range[1],
      range_max = input$measure_range[2],
      visible_counties = nrow(map_df)
    ),
    map_view = list(
      top_visible_counties = dataframe_to_records(top_visible_df),
      selected_county = if (nrow(selected_row) == 1) {
        list(
          county = selected_row$county_state[[1]],
          value = round(selected_row$map_value[[1]], 2),
          visible_rank = selected_rank
        )
      } else {
        NULL
      }
    ),
    interaction_view = interaction_context,
    comparison_view = comparison_context
  )
  
  paste0(
    "Current dashboard data:\n",
    jsonlite::toJSON(
      context_list,
      auto_unbox = TRUE,
      pretty = TRUE,
      null = "null"
    )
  )
}

observeEvent(input$generate_ai_summary, {
  ai_summary_text("Generating AI insight...")
  
  tryCatch({
    map_df = filtered_map_df()
    req(nrow(map_df) > 0)
    
    if (is.null(selected_county_fips()) || length(selected_county_fips()) == 0) {
      stop("Please click a county in Chart A before generating the AI summary.")
    }
    
    bar_df = top_interaction_df()
    compare_obj = feature_compare_data()
    
    prompt_text = build_ai_prompt(
      map_df = map_df,
      bar_df = bar_df,
      compare_obj = compare_obj
    )
    
    summary_text = call_openai_summary(prompt_text)
    ai_summary_text(summary_text)
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    ai_summary_text(
      paste(
        "AI summary could not be generated.",
        "",
        conditionMessage(e),
        sep = "\n"
      )
    )
  })
})

output$ai_summary_box = renderUI({
  tags$div(
    style = paste(
      "min-height: 220px;",
      "max-height: 420px;",
      "overflow-y: auto;",
      "white-space: pre-wrap;",
      "word-break: break-word;",
      "background: #f8f9fa;",
      "border: 1px solid #d9d9d9;",
      "border-radius: 8px;",
      "padding: 12px;",
      "font-size: 14px;",
      "line-height: 1.5;"
    ),
    ai_summary_text()
  )
})
```
